description: Style NoteYour little princess will love this top from gini and jony. Team it with leggings in funky colours for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsIvory white woven round neck top, has short puffed sleeves with buttoned cuffs, lace detailing on the front with embroidered branding at the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
